article.title: Valve engineer shocks Linux community with game-changing VRAM hack for 8GB GPUs — breakthrough solution turbocharges gaming by prioritizing VRAM for games while background tasks take a back seat
article.summary: Natalie Vock, a dev on Valve's Linux graphics driver team has introduced new fixes that optimize VRAM usage for games in Linux. Previously, any background task could make the OS evict game data from VRAM and throw it into system memory, but now it'll be able to correctly prioritize the game running in foreground.
article.title_zh: Valve工程師震撼Linux社群推出革命性VRAM黑科技——突破性解決方案通過優先為遊戲分配VRAM來大幅提升遊戲性能
article.summary_zh: Valve Linux圖形驅動團隊開發者Natalie Vock引入新的修復方案，優化Linux中遊戲的VRAM使用，使系統能夠正確優先考慮運行的遊戲，而不是讓後台任務佔用VRAM。

article.title: 5 ways this Google Maps AI feature helps avoid tourist traps
article.summary: Google Maps’ new AI chat tool showed up just in time for my Mumbai trip. I had to plan long commutes from the northern side, where I stayed, to the south, and discover all the must-try places in between. It was the perfect opportunity to test out Ask Maps to its limits — because that’s what Mumbai does to you, too. I’m proud that I made the best of this handy AI feature, and I found some amazing ways to make it work harder for me. Here are a few of those.
article.title_zh: Google Maps AI 功能幫助避開旅遊陷阱的 5 種方法
article.summary_zh: Google Maps 新推出的 AI 聊天工具在我的孟買之旅中應時而至。我需要規劃從北邊住所到南邊的長途通勤，並發現沿途必嚐的地點，這是測試 Ask Maps 功能的完美機會。

article.title: Claude Managed Agents上線　AI代理部署不再是工程難題
article.summary: Anthropic推出人工智慧代理（AI agent）託管平台Claude Managed Agents，與OpenAI Frontier打對台，讓開發者無需自行搭建複雜後端系統，只需專注於設計代理任務。Managed Agents產品核心是一套代理框架...
article.title_zh: Claude Managed Agents上線　AI代理部署不再是工程難題
article.summary_zh: Anthropic推出Claude Managed Agents託管平台，讓開發者無需自行搭建複雜後端系統，只需專注於設計代理任務。

article.title: Google Pixels just got a voicemail feature I’ve wanted for months — here’s how to use it
article.summary: Ever since it debuted on the Pixel 10 series last August, Take a Message has quickly become one of my favorite recent Pixel features. Essentially Google’s modern take on the voicemail box, Take a Message answers missed calls for you, shows real-time transcriptions, and makes those transcripts easy to read after the fact on the Phone app’s Home page. It’s great. However, there’s just been one problem with the feature. Take a Message greets callers with a standard “The person you have called is not available, please leave a message after the tone,” with no option to create a custom greeting. Thankfully, that’s no longer the case.
article.title_zh: Google Pixels 剛剛獲得我期待數月的語音留言功能 — 以下是使用方式
article.summary_zh: 自去年 8 月在 Pixel 10 系列推出以來，Take a Message 已成為我最喜歡的 Pixel 功能之一。作為 Google 對語音信箱的現代化解決方案，它可以為你接聽未接來電並顯示實時轉錄。

article.title: Possessing Starlink terminals punishable by death in Iran, country using 'military-grade jamming' against terminals — forced nationwide internet blackout becomes second-longest on record as it passes 1,000 hours offline
article.summary: Iran's nationwide Internet blackout has crossed the 1,000-hour mark and is now the second longest nation-scale shutdown ever measured.
article.title_zh: 伊朗將持有 Starlink 終端設備列為死罪，國家使用「軍用級干擾」對抗終端 — 全國網路停運成為第二長紀錄，離線時間已超 1,000 小時
article.summary_zh: 伊朗全國網路停運已超過 1,000 小時，成為有記錄以來第二長的全國規模斷網事件。

article.title: 雲端AI ASIC戰火延伸　中系業者強化平台布局、台系IC設計服務面臨潛在壓力
article.summary: 在生成式AI持續推升算力需求之際，雲端客製化AI晶片（AI ASIC）已成為全球半導體競爭的核心戰場之一。中國最大IC設計服務業者芯原近期釋出訊號，正加速由雲端延伸至終端AI ASIC解決方案平台，積極卡位下一波...
article.title_zh: 雲端AI ASIC戰火延伸　中系業者強化平台布局、台系IC設計服務面臨潛在壓力
article.summary_zh: 在生成式AI持續推升算力需求之際，雲端客製化AI晶片（AI ASIC）已成為全球半導體競爭的核心戰場之一。中國最大IC設計服務業者芯原近期釋出訊號，正加速由雲端延伸至終端AI ASIC解決方案平台，積極卡位下一波...

article.title: Google’s Tensor G5 is ‘good enough’ — but 2026 flagships are leaving the Pixel 10 behind
article.summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Qn_m9KKXjus In one hand, I hold the Xiaomi 17 Ultra — a powerhouse driven by Qualcomm’s benchmark-dominating Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 . In the other, Google’s Pixel 10 Pro XL, powered by the latest Tensor G5 chip. On paper, Google’s latest flagship looks far less impressive in terms of raw performance, a fact Pixel fans have just come to accept over the years and one that’s a constant thorn in the side of those who love a bit of mobile gaming every now and again. But benchmarks don’t always tell the full story — we seldom notice the extra 5% or 10% difference while browsing the web or scrolling feeds. Likewise, modern Android games aren’t always built to push cutting-edge silicon to its limits, and real-world performance often depends just as much on optimiz
article.title_zh: Google Tensor G5 已『足夠好』——但 2026 年旗艦機正在將 Pixel 10 甩在身後
article.summary_zh: 一手是搭載高通 Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 的小米 17 Ultra，另一手是搭載最新 Tensor G5 晶片的 Google Pixel 10 Pro XL，紙面上 Google 最新旗艦機的表現看起來遠不如對手。

article.title: South Korea’s telecom giants surprise 7 million users with unlimited, universal internet — net access declared a 'basic telecommunications right,' 400 Kbps data after monthly plans run out
article.summary: South Korea's Ministry of Science and ICT said that the country’s three major carriers will provide more than seven million mobile subscribers with unmetered 400 Kbps data.
article.title_zh: 南韓電信巨頭驚喜為700萬用戶提供無限通用網際網路——網路存取宣佈為「基本電信權利」，月度方案用盡後提供400 Kbps數據
article.summary_zh: 南韓科學和ICT部表示，該國三大電信商將為超過700萬手機用戶提供無計費400 Kbps數據服務。

article.title: Linux 7.0 enables three new AI-specific keys for keyboards, an apparent expansion beyond the Copilot key — Google authors both the HID spec and the kernel patch
article.summary: The Linux 7.0 kernel has merged support for three new keycodes intended for a coming wave of laptops with dedicated AI agent keys.
article.title_zh: Linux 7.0 為鍵盤新增三個 AI 專用按鍵，超越 Copilot 按鍵的擴展 — Google 同時編寫 HID 規範和核心補丁
article.summary_zh: Linux 7.0 核心已合併支援三個新的按鍵碼，用於即將推出的一波配備專用 AI 代理按鍵的筆記型電腦。

article.title: Lenovo hikes Legion Go 2 handheld gaming PC to almost $3,000 for 2 TB model — Handheld now costs more than AMD's Strix Halo devices despite relatively weaker Z2 Extreme chip
article.summary: Lenovo has raised the prices of its Legion Go 2 handhelds (with Z2 Extreme) across the board, with the worse offended being the 2 TB model, receiving a 93% hike. It went from $1,480 at launch to a staggering $2,850 in the span of just a few months, while the 1 TB model is now $2,000, up from $1,350 at launch.
article.title_zh: Lenovo 將 Legion Go 2 掌上遊戲電腦 2TB 版本漲價至近 $3,000 — 儘管 Z2 Extreme 晶片相對較弱，掌上電腦現已超過 AMD Strix Halo 設備價格
article.summary_zh: Lenovo 大幅調漲 Legion Go 2 掌上電腦（Z2 Extreme 版本）的價格，其中 2TB 型號漲幅最大達 93%，從發售時的 $1,480 跳漲至 $2,850，而 1TB 版本則從 $1,350 漲至 $2,000。

article.title: An Engineering Roadmap Toward Completely Neural Computers (Meta AI, KAUST)
article.summary: A new technical paper, “Neural Computers,” was published by researchers at Meta AI and KAUST. Abstract “We propose a new frontier: Neural Computers (NCs) — an emerging machine form that unifies computation, memory, and I/O in a learned runtime state. Unlike conventional computers, which execute explicit programs, agents, which act over external execution environments, and world models, which learn environment dynamics, NCs aim to make the model itself the running computer. Our long-term goal is the Completely Neural Computer (CNC): the mature, general-purpose realization of this emerging machine form, with stable execution, explicit reprogramming, and durable capability reuse. As an initial step, we study whether early NC primitives can be learned solely from collec
article.title_zh: 邁向完全神經計算機的工程路線圖（Meta AI、KAUST）
article.summary_zh: Meta AI和KAUST的研究人員發表了新技術論文「Neural Computers」，提出將計算、記憶和I/O統一在學習運行時狀態中的新興機器形式。
